info.title: DJ Playlist API
info.description: OpenAPI for validated API handlers. Generated from src/api-contract definitions.

delete.summary: Clear all queued and indexed jobs

get.summary: Get a single job status by id

200.description: Server-sent events stream used by the UI to react to completed/failed jobs without polling. Initial event data is `connected`.

put.summary: Upload or replace GAMDL cookie file

post.summary: Run GAMDL action (cookie_status, delete_cookie, test_connection, reset_settings)

get.summary: Get GAMDL settings for a friend

put.summary: Update GAMDL settings for a friend

get.summary: Stream local audio file for browser playback

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Local audio filename or relative path stored in `local_audio_url`.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Optional byte range header for seeking (example: `bytes=0-1023`).

post.summary: Generate genetic ordering for playlist tracks

schema.description: SQL-style filter expression. Multiple conditions joined with ' AND '. Supported values: 'local_audio_url IS NULL' (missing audio), '(bpm IS NULL OR key IS NULL)' (missing metadata), 'apple_music_url IS NULL' (missing Apple Music), 'youtube_url IS NULL' (missing YouTube), 'soundcloud_url IS NULL' (missing SoundCloud), '(apple_music_url IS NULL AND youtube_url IS NULL AND soundcloud_url IS NULL)' (missing all streaming URLs).

get.summary: Get recommendation candidates (combined, identity-only, or audio-only)

parameters.name: friend_id
parameters.description: Library owner id for the seed track.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Select retrieval mode. `combined` unions both embeddings, `identity` only identity embedding, `audio` only audio vibe embedding.

parameters.name: limit_identity
parameters.description: Maximum candidates from identity embedding search. Ignored when `mode=audio`.

parameters.name: limit_audio
parameters.description: Maximum candidates from audio vibe embedding search. Ignored when `mode=identity`.

parameters.name: ivfflat_probes
parameters.description: pgvector ivfflat probes setting; higher is more accurate and slower.

400.description: Invalid query (missing/invalid parameters or out-of-range limits)

post.summary: Get recommendation candidates from multiple seed tracks

get.summary: Lookup Discogs release JSON and matched track by track_id

post.summary: Search YouTube Music videos by track metadata
Search Apple Music catalog by track metadata

schema.description: Filter albums missing a library identifier
Filter albums missing local cover art
Filter albums with at least one track missing local audio

post.summary: Create a local album with tracks
Create or update album and tracks

get.summary: Get raw Discogs release payload for album
Sync Discogs collection and stream progress output

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Discogs username to sync. Defaults to `DISCOGS_USERNAME` when omitted.

post.summary: Delete selected Discogs release exports and related DB tracks

200.description: Track playlist counts keyed by track_id:friend_id

404.description: Track not found or already deleted

get.summary: Get local audio metadata for track

404.description: No embedded artwork / track not found

BearerAuth.description: Defined for endpoints that use bearer auth. No current documented endpoint requires it.
